schema_id.description: Always 'VOPlan'. Renamed from AssetManifest. Written by gen_tts_cloud.py and extended in-place by post_tts_analysis.py, polish_locale_vo.py, vo_retune.py, apply_music_plan.py, and resolve_assets.py.

project_id.description: Matches the project directory slug under projects/

episode_id.description: Episode identifier (e.g. s01e02). Together with project_id forms the canonical asset path: projects/{project_id}/episodes/{episode_id}/

locale_scope.description: 'monolithic' = legacy flat manifest. 'merged' = per-locale VOPlan produced by gen_tts_cloud.py, combining shared assets + locale VO items in one file. The 'shared' and 'locale' split-manifest scopes are eliminated (manifest_merge.py removed from pipeline).

locale.description: BCP-47 locale tag (e.g. 'en', 'zh-Hans'). Required when locale_scope is 'merged'.

gender.description: Voice gender for TTS assignment. Always derive explicitly from the story — 'male', 'female', or 'neutral' for non-human/ambiguous voices.

search_prompt.description: 5-10 keywords for free library image search
5-10 keywords for free library image search

ai_prompt_variations.description: Additional AI image generation prompts for the same scene. Each varies one primary visual dimension from ai_prompt (composition, lighting, atmosphere, or tonal emphasis). Same ~2 sentence cinematic format as ai_prompt.

search_queries.description: 2–4 diverse query variant strings for multi-query rotation in the media search service. Each query is issued independently; results are deduplicated before trimming to n.

source_filters.description: Per-source native API filter parameters. Keys are source names ('pexels', 'pixabay'). Values are dicts of API params that override the media server's always-on defaults.

pexels.description: Pexels API params: color, orientation, size, locale

pixabay.description: Pixabay API params: category, editors_choice, colors, order

scoring_hints.description: Per-dimension CLIP scoring hints. Each dimension is a list of descriptive text phrases. The media scorer computes CLIP similarity for each phrase and takes the max per dimension.

cinematic_role.description: How this background functions cinematically. Adjusts scorer weight profile: establish→boost environment; hold→boost subjects; transition→boost motion; emotional_support→boost style; atmosphere→boost environment+style.

motion_level.description: Expected amount of visual motion in the background.

lighting.description: Desired lighting quality. Injected as an extra style CLIP sub-prompt during scoring.

include_keywords.description: Terms that MUST appear in asset metadata/tags. Used as post-search filter.

exclude_keywords.description: Terms that must NOT appear in asset metadata/tags. Used as hard-exclude post-search filter.

continuity_hints.description: Shot continuity / sequence ranking hints for the DP sequence ranker.

group_id.description: Shared identifier for a sequence of shots that should look visually consistent.

allowed_shift.description: Maximum allowed hue-histogram L1 distance between consecutive shots in the group (0.0–1.0, default 0.4).

vo_items.description: Per-VO-item timing and synthesis parameters. BOUNDARY: start_sec/end_sec are ITEM-LEVEL episode-absolute timestamps only. VOPlan does NOT store shot-level or scene-level start_sec/end_sec — those belong exclusively in ShotList.json.

visual.description: Set to false for VO-only speakers with no visual representation. Renderer holds on the current background instead of looking up a character_pack.

start_sec.description: Episode-absolute start time of this VO item (seconds). Written by post_tts_analysis.py after TTS approval. Absent before approval.

end_sec.description: Episode-absolute end time of this VO item (seconds). Written by post_tts_analysis.py after TTS approval. Absent before approval. render_video.py derives shot-relative VO end as (end_sec − shot.start_sec).

pause_after_ms.description: Silence gap in milliseconds appended after this VO item before the next begins. Written by post_tts_analysis.py.

not.description: duration_sec is PROHIBITED — always derive as (end_sec − start_sec). Do NOT write or read this field.

vo_approval.description: Written atomically by /api/vo_approve when the user approves the VO take. Protected from pipeline wipe — all in-place writers must re-read and preserve this block before writing.

stage.description: Pipeline stage at time of approval (e.g. 'legacy', 'tts_v2').

wav_set_hash.description: SHA-256 of the WAV file set approved. Used to detect if TTS re-generation would invalidate the approval.

trim_overrides_hash.description: SHA-256 of any per-item trim override values at time of approval.

scene_breaks.description: Optional list of shot_ids that mark scene boundaries, recorded at approval time.

scene_tails.description: Per-shot tail silence in milliseconds, keyed by shot_id. Written by the VO approval UI. render_video.py resolves scene_tail_ms with three-level priority: (1) this dict, (2) shot.duration_sec*1000 − last_vo_out_ms, (3) constant fallback VO_TAIL_MS=2000.

additionalProperties.description: Tail silence in milliseconds for this shot_id.

scene_heads.description: Optional per-scene intro silence in SECONDS, keyed by scene_id (e.g. 'sc01'). Inserted before the first VO item of the scene. Written by the VO tab 'Intro pause' control and persisted by /api/vo_scene_head. Baked into vo_items[].start_sec at Confirm Plan time. Missing key = 0s (no intro pause). Unlike scene_tails (which uses ms), this field uses seconds to match the start_sec/end_sec coordinate space.

additionalProperties.description: Intro silence in seconds before the first VO item of this scene.

element_images.description: Per-shot scene element image entries. Each entry describes one physical visual element identified from the shot's narration. item_id format: 'el-{shot_id}-{element-slug}'.

background_overrides.description: Locale-specific background video overrides for shots where VO duration exceeds the shared background clip. Written by post_tts_analysis.py.

timing_lock_hash.description: SHA-256 of the canonical per-shot duration list used to generate background overrides.

resolved_assets.description: Written in-place by resolve_assets.py (receives VOPlan path via --manifest in run.sh). Empty [] immediately after gen_tts_cloud.py; populated with resolved URIs after resolve_assets.py runs. render_video.py reads via build_media_map() shim: media_shim = {'items': voplan['resolved_assets']}.

SearchFilters.description: Metadata filters applied when querying free libraries (Pexels, Pixabay, Unsplash, Freesound).
